sprintGoal: 实现订单路由（ATU-004），全部 19 个测试通过

atus.title: Implement Product Routes
atus.description: Implement routes_product.py: GET /products (list all products), POST /products (admin only, create product).

history.action: Sprint 1 Round 1 — Developer 完成 routes_product.py 实现
Sprint 1 Round 1 — Tester 报告：6/6 产品路由测试通过
Sprint 1 Round 1 — Reviewer 审查通过

atus.title: Add Order origin field to model
atus.description: Add 'origin' field (String, default 'web') to Order model in models.py.

history.action: Sprint 1 Round 1 — Developer 完成 models.py 修改
Sprint 1 Round 1 — Reviewer 审查通过

atus.title: Implement rate limiting middleware
atus.description: Add rate limiting function in middleware.py: same user can only submit 1 order per 10 seconds.

history.action: Sprint 1 Round 1 — Developer 完成 middleware.py 限流函数实现
Sprint 1 Round 1 — Reviewer 审查通过

atus.title: Implement Order Routes with all features
atus.description: Implement routes_order.py: POST /orders (create order with stock deduction, origin support, rate limiting check, atomic stock), GET /orders (admin sees all, user sees own).

history.action: Sprint 2 Round 1 — Developer 完成 routes_order.py 完整实现
Sprint 2 Round 1 — Tester 报告：19/19 全部测试通过
Sprint 2 Round 1 — Reviewer 审查通过
